# Stack Disable

GitHub Copilot adapter for [`../../../skills/stack-disable/SKILL.md`](../../../skills/stack-disable/SKILL.md).

Use this skill to deactivate one supported artifact in `stack.md`, with root-first precedence in monorepos.
